Off Calendar Mar-27-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Notice Of Settlement And To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC'S Motion To Set Aside Notice Of Settlement And To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation And For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT BOTH SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
